_comment: Maps git repo names to Linear project(s), team, and description. Used by resolve-project.sh (placement) and /spec (discovery).

amparo.description: CRM + case management + document engine for the ANCLA/FRAPE church insurance program in PR. Captures/routes/stores/outputs only — never rates, quotes, binds, or collects (regulatory guardrail). RR v7 + Drizzle/Postgres + Tailwind 4 + Better Auth; AWS ECS Fargate/RDS/S3 via Terraform later. Solo project. NOTE: lives in the dedicated amparo-app workspace — use the linear-amparo MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

cyberdeck.description: Persistent control plane for your agent fleet that happens to have a first-class full terminal in it — tmux in the browser over Tailscale. Bun end-to-end (Bun.serve + native PTY) + React/Vite/xterm.js. Built bit-by-bit, terminal-hardening pillar first. NOTE: lives in the dedicated cyber-deck workspace — use the linear-cyberdeck MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

.dotfiles.description: Dotfiles + the Claude Code agent toolchain (~/.dotfiles/claude): dispatch/issue/spec skills, enforcement hooks, runner + pr-reviewer agents, shared scripts, plus tmux/bash/kitty config. NOTE: lives in the cyber-deck workspace — use the linear-cyberdeck MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

rimas-infrastructure.description: Rimas cloud platform & Tailscale zero-trust (SOW-2026-002). OpenTofu IaC: multi-account AWS org (management/staging/production), VPC, ECS Fargate, ECR, Secrets/KMS, CloudTrail/GuardDuty/Config/SCPs, Tailscale subnet router. NOTE: lives in the Rimas Entertainment Linear workspace — use the linear-rimas MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

aws-infrastructure.description: Terragrunt/Terraform IaC: ECS, ECR, RDS, S3, Route53, IAM for all workloads

crm.description: Rails CRM: deal flow tracking, pipeline management

claude.description: Claude Code plugin: shared skills, hooks, practices for Augment Risk engineering

helm.description: Helm: strategic initiative portfolio tool (React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS 4, Express 5)

tf-modules.description: Reusable Terraform modules (compute, data-stores, networking, etc.)

windmill.description: Windmill platform: ELT pipelines, apps (lakeviewer), helm, infra

nullbreaker.description: Cyberpunk turn-based tactical RPG (Phaser + React client, Colyseus server). Solo project. NOTE: lives in the dedicated Nullbreaker workspace — use the linear-nullbreaker MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

parcha.description: Browser-hosted live-coding DAW with MCP-first architecture (Preact + CodeMirror + Strudel). Solo project. NOTE: lives in the dedicated parchamusic workspace — use the linear-parchamusic MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

mesa.description: QR pay-at-table split-pay for PR restaurants (ATH Móvil + Clover). Hono on Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects + D1/Drizzle + RR v7. Solo project. NOTE: lives in the dedicated mesa-pr workspace — use the linear-mesa MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.

stackbreaker.description: Cyberpunk ASCII dungeon crawler where real websites are dungeons (Rust + ratatui). Shares universe with nullbreaker (net-diving facet). Solo project. NOTE: lives in the dedicated Stackbreaker workspace — use the linear-stackbreaker MCP for Linear calls, not the default workspace.
